name: radio-group
description: A set of mutually exclusive radio options. Built on Radix UI RadioGroup with roving focus and arrow-key navigation.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Default selected value for uncontrolled usage

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback on value change: (value: string) => void

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name (for native form submission)

slots.name: children
slots.description: RadioGroupItem elements, typically paired with Labels

examples.title: Basic radio group

ai.whenToUse: Use for mutually exclusive choices from a short list (2-5 options) where all options should be visible. Pair each RadioGroupItem with a Label.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for many options (use Select). Don't use for boolean toggles (use Switch or Checkbox). Don't use for multi-select.
commonMistakes: Using for more than 5 options (use Select)
Using htmlFor id mismatch between Label and RadioGroupItem
ai.accessibilityNotes: Radix implements the WAI-ARIA radio group pattern. Arrow keys move focus+selection. Radix handles aria-checked, role='radiogroup', role='radio'.
